ddls:
CREATE TABLE "water_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water site */,
  "state" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the site is located */,
  "district" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the site is located */,
  "teh_name" INTEGER /* Reference to the tehsil (sub-district) where the site is located */,
  "block_name" TEXT /* Block name of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "site_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the site (e.g., Bore Well, Dug Well) */,
  "wl_code" TEXT /* Water level code associated with the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site above sea level */,
  "groundwater_zone" TEXT /* Groundwater zone classification (e.g., safe, semi-critical, critical) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who last inspected the site */,
  "site_status" TEXT /* Current status of the site (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_sites_teh_name FOREIGN KEY ("teh_name") REFERENCES tehsils ("tehsil_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_sites_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_sites_district FOREIGN KEY ("district") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_sites_site_type FOREIGN KEY ("site_type") REFERENCES water_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the water site where the observation was made */,
  "year_obs" INTEGER /* Year of the observation */,
  "monsoon" TEXT /* Monsoon conditions during the observation (e.g., None, Active) */,
  "pomrb" REAL /* Post-monsoon rainfall value */,
  "pomkh" REAL /* Post-monsoon key hydrological value */,
  "premon" REAL /* Pre-monsoon rainfall value */,
  "groundwater_level" REAL /* Measured groundwater level */,
  "rainfall_sources" TEXT /* Sources of rainfall data (e.g., local weather stations, satellite data) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of observation */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of observation */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who made the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES water_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the state belongs (e.g., North, South, East, West) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the district belongs to */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tehsils" (
  "tehsil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tehsil */,
  "tehsil_name" TEXT /* Name of the tehsil */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the tehsil belongs to */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the tehsil in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the tehsil */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tehsil_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of water source */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the water source type (e.g., Bore Well, Dug Well) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the water source type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_levels" (
  "level_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water level code */,
  "code" TEXT /* Water level code (e.g., W02294) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the water level code */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold level for the water source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the water level (e.g., normal, low, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., field officer, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the water site being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES water_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
